channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Home Depot profit dips but beats forecasts amid economic uncertainty
item.description: Home Depot's quarterly results exceeded Wall Street expectations, driven by strong demand from professional customers despite a slowdown in homeowner spending.

item.title: Trump keeps military action against Iran as an option while pursuing diplomacy
item.description: President Trump said he called off a planned strike on Iran at the urging of Gulf allies, as serious peace talks continue.

item.title: In a first, Defense Secretary Hegseth campaigns during Iran conflict
item.description: The Pentagon stated that no taxpayer funds were used for the trip.

item.title: Why has the UK had six prime ministers in under a decade?
item.description: Political turmoil has gripped Britain, with six leaders in ten years, including one who served only 45 days.
